feed.title: James Fenn
feed.subtitle: Writer of bad puns and slightly better software. This website contains information about my adventures in programming, current projects, and me.

entry.title: Self-Hosting Music Distribution
entry.description: Considering alternatives to modern music distribution with small platforms and self-hosted sites!

entry.title: What have I been up to?
entry.description: A summary of some of the various projects I've been working on this year.

entry.title: Minecraft Data Pack Programming: Scoreboard Usage
entry.description: A beginner-friendly series for teaching programming concepts with Minecraft data packs.

entry.title: Minecraft Data Pack Programming: Command Syntax
entry.description: A beginner-friendly series for teaching programming concepts with Minecraft data packs.

entry.title: Minecraft Data Pack Programming: Introduction
entry.description: A beginner-friendly series for teaching programming concepts with Minecraft data packs.

entry.title: Dynamic Backgrounds in Unicorn Utterances' Preview Images
entry.description: An explanation of some CSS tricks and techniques I used to make a neat contribution to the Unicorn Utterances blog site.

entry.title: Declarativ: an experimental React-like HTML framework
entry.description: A breakdown of the concepts used in Declarativ, a lightweight JavaScript HTML templating library.

entry.title: Audio Automation: using Java's MIDI APIs with Kotlin Flow
entry.description: An explanation of the development process behind a MIDI library using the Kotlin Flow API.

entry.title: Animating SVG Icons on the Web
entry.description: A small breakdown of the process I used to create a couple interactive icons for a web project.

entry.title: Ethics of Artificial Intelligence
entry.description: An overview of the discourse surrounding "ethical AI" and its use in the Big Tech industry.

entry.title: Federated Social Networks
entry.description: Explaining what the fediverse is, how to join it, and why.

entry.title: Ethical Source and Subjectivity
entry.description: A mini-summary / explanation of some criticisms of the Ethical Source Movement.

entry.title: Free Software and RMS
entry.description: A summary of my thoughts on the relationship between Richard Stallman and the Free Software Movement.

entry.title: Open Source in Education
entry.description: A discussion of the open source model as a solution to many issues in higher education.

entry.title: JavaScript: Productivity over Proof
entry.description: In the vast majority everyday software, nobody writes a mathematical proof of every piece of functionality. Dynamically typed languages exist for a reason, and this is not it.

entry.title: Introduction to Android: Contexts, Intents, and the Activity lifecycle
entry.description: A basic overview of the main components of an Android app and how they interact with each other and the Android system.

entry.title: Continuous Integration with Travis CI for Android
entry.description: An in-depth tutorial explaining how to set up Travis CI to deploy signed builds to Google Play. Among other things.

entry.title: CSS Submodules
entry.description: How I organize my site's CSS and why.

entry.title: Exceptional Traveler
entry.description: I explain how and why (sort of) I wrote an implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem using Exceptional Programming standards.

entry.title: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHH
entry.description: A small command-line utility I wrote with Go that I had a lot of fun with.

entry.title: Client-Side JavaScript
entry.description: Why I rewrote my site with Jekyll, rather than running a ton of client-side JavaScript that doesn't really work all of the time.

entry.title: Attribouter
entry.description: A short breakdown of a really really big library I wrote to credit contributors and libraries used in my Android projects.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.description: I made a blog.
